keyEvents.text: Goal! Columbus Crew 1, Philadelphia Union 0. Max Arfsten (Columbus Crew) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal.
Danley Jean Jacques (Philadelphia Union) is shown the yellow card.
Sékou Bangoura (Columbus Crew) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Own Goal by Nathan Harriel, Philadelphia Union. Columbus Crew 2, Philadelphia Union 0.
Substitution, Philadelphia Union. Jovan Lukic replaces Jesús Bueno because of an injury.
First Half ends, Columbus Crew 2, Philadelphia Union 0.
Substitution, Philadelphia Union. Ben Bender replaces Philippe Ndinga.
Second Half begins Columbus Crew 2, Philadelphia Union 0.
Substitution, Columbus Crew. Steven Moreira replaces Hugo Picard.
Substitution, Philadelphia Union. Augustín Anello replaces Jeremy Rafanello.
Substitution, Philadelphia Union. Indiana Vassilev replaces Cavan Sullivan.
Substitution, Columbus Crew. Jamal Thiaré replaces Diego Rossi.
Substitution, Columbus Crew. Dániel Gazdag replaces Taha Habroune.
Substitution, Columbus Crew. Amar Sejdic replaces Sékou Bangoura because of an injury.
Substitution, Columbus Crew. Mohamed Farsi replaces Max Arfsten.
Substitution, Philadelphia Union. Ezekiel Alladoh replaces Bruno Damiani.
Japhet Sery Larsen (Philadelphia Union) is shown the red card.
